description_long: This is a light blue athletic running shoe with a sleek, aerodynamic design and a low profile. The upper is perforated for breathability and features a synthetic mesh material, with a reinforced heel counter in dark gray and a subtle red accent near the sole. The midsole is white with a blue and red accent, providing cushioning and support, while the outsole appears to be made of durable rubber. The shoe has a standard criss-cross lacing system with matching blue laces and a padded tongue for comfort. A prominent white Under Armour logo is visible on the lateral side, indicating the brand. The interior lining is red, and the overall condition of the shoe appears clean and well-maintained, suggesting it is either new or like new.
description: A light blue athletic running shoe with perforated mesh, a white Under Armour logo, and red and gray accents. The shoe features a standard lacing system and appears clean and well-cushioned.
description_view_0: Side view showing the light blue upper, perforations, gray heel counter, and red accent on the midsole.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the dark gray heel counter, red interior lining, and the rounded heel shape.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the prominent white Under Armour logo, blue mesh, and white midsole.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the blue laces, perforated toe box, and the slightly textured white outsole.
attribute_logo: White Under Armour logo on the lateral side near the midfoot
